channel.title: Widgets and UI :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Solved Flutter widget exercises: ListView.builder, BottomNavigationBar, dark mode with ThemeMode, and async loading with FutureBuilder.

item.title: CustomPainter in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise for CustomPainter: draw a progress ring and a bar chart using the Canvas API from scratch.

item.title: Long lists and images in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Improve long-list performance with image caching and efficient builders.

item.title: Reduce unnecessary rebuilds in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Optimize rendering with const widgets, keys, and state selectors.

item.title: Dark Mode in Flutter with ThemeMode: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter dark mode exercise with ThemeMode to switch between light and dark themes cleanly.

item.title: BottomNavigationBar in Flutter: solved exercise with IndexedStack
item.description: Solved BottomNavigationBar Flutter exercise using IndexedStack to preserve tab state between sections.

item.title: ListView.builder in Flutter: solved exercise with dynamic list
item.description: Solved ListView.builder Flutter exercise to render long dynamic lists efficiently with reusable item widgets.
